task: Parse an X12 EDI 278 services-review transaction (5010A1) for prior authorization / referral / admission certification. Emit normalized JSON: { format, direction, purpose, umo, requester, subscriber, patient, service, attached_paperwork?, response? }. Auto-detects request vs response by presence of HCR (health-care-services-review) segment.

recipes.name: edi-278
recipes.source: function generate(input,lib){var t=(input&&typeof input.edi_text==='string')?input.edi_text:'';var DEC={A1:'certified',A2:'partial',A3:'denied',A4:'pended',A6:'modified'};var PUR={'13':'initial','15':'reconsideration','16':'appeal','01':'cancellation','06':'resubmission'};var d=function(s){return s?s.slice(0,4)+'-'+s.slice(4,6)+'-'+s.slice(6,8):null};var S=t.split(/~\s*/).filter(Boolean);var o={format:'278',direction:'request',purpose:'initial',umo:{},requester:{type:'physician'},subscriber:{redacted_member_id:'<hash>'},patient:{},service:{procedure_codes:[],diagnoses:[]}};var sH=false,sP=false,re={};for(var i=0;i<S.length;i++){var f=S[i].split('*'),T=f[0];if(T==='BHT')o.purpose=PUR[f[2]]||'initial';else if(T==='NM1'){var e=f[1];if(e==='X3'){o.umo.name=f[3]||null;o.umo.payer_id=f[8]||null;}else if(e==='1P'){o.requester.name=f[3]||null;o.requester.npi=f[9]||null;o.requester.type=f[2]==='2'?'facility':'physician';}else if(e==='QC')o.patient.relationship='01';}else if(T==='DMG'){o.patient.dob=f[1]==='D8'?d(f[2]):null;o.patient.gender=f[3]||null;}else if(T==='UM'){o.service.type_code=f[1]||null;o.service.level_of_care=f[6]||null;o.service.place_of_service=(f[4]||'').split(':')[0]||null;}else if(T==='REF'&&f[1]==='BB')re.certification_number=f[2]||null;else if(T==='DTP'){var x=f[3]||'';if(f[1]==='291'&&f[2]==='RD8'&&x.indexOf('-')>0){var p=x.split('-');o.service.requested_start=d(p[0]);o.service.requested_end=d(p[1]);}else if(f[1]==='348'&&f[2]==='D8')re.valid_from=d(x);else if(f[1]==='349'&&f[2]==='D8')re.valid_to=d(x);}else if(T==='HI')for(var j=1;j<f.length;j++){var h=(f[j]||'').split(':');if(h[1])o.service.diagnoses.push(h[1]);}else if(T==='PWK'){sP=true;o.attached_paperwork={type:f[1]||null,transmission:f[2]||null,control_number:f[6]||null};}else if(T==='HSD'){var u=parseInt(f[2]||'0',10);if(!o.service.requested_units&&u)o.service.requested_units=u;}else if(T==='HCR'){sH=true;re.action_code=f[1]||null;re.decision=DEC[f[1]]||null;re.decision_reason=f[3]||null;}}if(sH){o.direction='response';o.response=re;}return o;}

pack.description: X12 5010A1 278 reference rules. um01_request_categories are real UM01 request-category codes; hcr01_action_codes are the certification action codes the UMO returns in HCR01 on the response; level_of_service_codes are real UM02 values from the 5010A1 implementation guide.
